form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming finished fourth of 11 runners at Ayr on January 29 over 4100m, slow track; 7 len behind Diamond Geezer with 69.5kg at $6. Second-up finished fifth of 14 starters at Kelso on March 21 over 4200m, 10 len behind Speiriuil with 67.5kg at $13. Cannot be left out in this more suitable contest.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Not raced for 49 days. Fresh up after 13 months finished eighth of 11 runners at Ayr on February 23 over 4100m, on slow going 24 len behind Eloi Du Puy carrying 72.5kg at $26. Previously second-up finished fifth of 11 starters at Carlisle on November 19 2024 over 4000m, 23 len behind Ira Hayes with 71.5kg at $67. Definite chance. Will strip fitter and makes plenty of appeal.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; having raced just once last campaign made some head-way from midfield; finished fourth of 13 starters at Newcastle on December 11 over 4100m, 14 len behind Baratablet with 72kg at $13. First up last campaign finished second of 10 starters at Fairyhouse on April 6 2025 over 4023m, 2.5 len behind Crescent Moon carrying 62.5kg at $21. Sure to prove tough to stop.

form.formComment: Impressive in recent runs. Last outing ran last in a small field at Sedgefield on March 19 over 5300m, 5 len behind Ballin Bay carrying 70.5kg at $3.30. Start before won by 2 len Catterick on February 9 over 5000m slow going defeating West Lawn with 74.5kg at $2.20 in a steeplechase. Fought on last time. Will take some beating.
